description_html:

Description

Liposomal Brain Complex is a thoughtfully-formulated supplement designed to support healthy cognitive function, mental clarity, and emotional well-being.* Harnessing the wisdom of traditional botanicals and elevated by modern science, this formula features science-backed herbs delivered through advanced liposomal technology.

The star ingredient of the formula is Zembrin®, commonly known as kanna, a clinically-studied botanical ingredient from South Africa. This formula uses 25 mg of Zembrin®, the clinically-validated dose shown to support healthy cognitive function, mental clarity and focus, stress resilience, and a balanced mood.*

Rhodiola rosea is also included in the formula, which studies show can support normal cognitive processes related to learning and memory.* Brain Complex brings liposomally-delivered botanical brain support right to your fingertips.

How to Enjoy

How: Squeeze contents of packet into mouth or stir into your favorite beverage.

When: Daily

Dose: 1 packet

Notes: Great in the morning for increased energy and focus.

Ingredients

Active Ingredients: Rhodiola rosea extract, Phosphatidylcholine (from Sunflower Lecithin), Bacopa monnieri extract, Zembrin® (Sceletium tortuosum), Huperzine A (from Huperzia Serrata)

Other Ingredients: Glycerin, Water, Organic Almond Butter, Organic Evaporated Coconut Nectar, Organic Cassava Syrup, Organic Cocoa Extract, Sea Salt, Organic Vanilla Powder, Organic Vanilla Extract, Pectin, D-Alpha-Tocopherol, Sodium Alginate, Calcium Lactate, Organic Cinnamon Powder, Organic Ginger Root Extract, Organic Clove Powder, Organic Cardamom Powder.

name: Glutathione 12-Pack Starter Kit
description_html:
Benefits

Liposomal Glutathione may help with the following:

  • Supports gut health and healthy glutathione levels*
  • Supports the liver's natural detoxification*
  • Provides antioxidant support for skin health*

Third Party Testing

Tested for purity and safety by Certified Labs. Verified absence of harmful bacteria, heavy metals, and contaminants. Product meets all quality standards, with clear labeling and stability checks for your peace of mind.

View Full PDF

Description

Support your body’s natural defenses with this advanced liposomal glutathione formula. Glutathione is often called the body’s “master antioxidant,” playing a vital role in detoxification, immune health, and protecting cells from oxidative stress. This formula uses a liposomal delivery system, which helps protect glutathione through digestion and improves absorption, making it more effective than standard supplements.

Alongside glutathione, this formula also features PQQ, a powerful antioxidant compound that helps reduce oxidative stress and supports brain and mitochondrial health. With just the right amount of vitamin B2 to meet daily needs, this formula avoids excess dosing, offering practical, targeted support you can trust. Clean, convenient, and thoughtfully formulated to help you stay resilient and energized.

How to Enjoy

This product is best taken on an empty stomach at least 20 minutes before meals. This formula can be taken any time of the day*.

Store in a cool, dark place or refrigerate after opening. Do not freeze.

26 pouches per container

*To be used as directed by your healthcare provider or physician.
Disclaimer: If you are pregnant, nursing a baby, or have a chronic medical condition such as diabetes, hypertension or heart disease, be sure to consult your doctor or pharmacist before purchasing or taking any supplement.

Ingredients

Riboflavin, Glutathione, Phosphatidylcholine (from sunflower lecithin), CoQ10 (ubiquinol), Pyrroloquinoline Quinone.

Other ingredients: Glycerin, Organic Cassava Syrup, Organic MCT Oil, Organic Orange Oil,

Antioxidant Blend (Tocopherol Extract, Rosemary Extract), Organic Tangerine Oil, Organic Vanilla Extract.

description_html:
Benefits

  • Supports reduction of oxidative stress*
  • Supports a healthy inflammatory response*
  • Provides antioxidant support for whole body wellness*

PRO-TIP:  Pair with Cymbiotika’s Liposomal Glutathione to support your body’s natural detox pathways and promote antioxidant defense*.

Third Party Testing

Tested for purity and safety by Certified Labs. Verified absence of harmful bacteria, heavy metals, and contaminants. Product meets all quality standards, with clear labeling and stability checks for your peace of mind.

View Full PDF

Description

Inflammatory Health is a revolutionary supplement formulated to support a healthy inflammatory response throughout the body. This next-generation formula blends science-backed traditional botanical ingredients to maintain a balanced immune system, support a healthy inflammatory response, and promote joint comfort and mobility. By helping the body manage oxidative stress and maintain a healthy immune response, Inflammatory Health helps maintain balance and overall vitality*.

This enhanced formula incorporates cutting-edge ingredients such as optimized PEA, advanced White Willow, reformulated Nobiletin, Arnica, and DigeSEB, which supports a healthy inflammatory response, digestive function, joint comfort, and cellular antioxidant defense*.

With daily use, Inflammatory Health supports joint comfort, aids in recovery from daily physical stress, and helps maintain your body’s natural immune defenses. From intense workouts to everyday wellness, this formula supports your body’s natural inflammatory response and helps you feel your best*.

How to Enjoy

Suggested use: Adults, take three (3) capsules daily with water as a dietary supplement, or as directed by a qualified healthcare practitioner.

Ingredients

Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA), White Willow (Salix alba) Bark Extract, Chinese Skullcap (Scutellaria baicalensis) Root Extract, Arnica (Arnica montana) Stem, Leaf and Flower Powder, Turmeric (Curcuma longa) Root Extract (Organic), Boswellia serrata Gum-Resin Extract, Hesperidin (from Orange (Citrus sinensis) Powder Extract), Sour Cherry (Prunus cerasus) Fruit Extract (Organic), DigeSEB Plus™ (Amylase, cellulase, Diastase, Invertase, Lactase, Lipase, Protease I, Protease II), Bromelain (80 GDU), Devil's Claw (Harpagophytum procumbens) Root Extract, Ginger (Zingiber officinale) Root Extract, Nobiletin (from Citrus aurantium Fruit Extract), Capsicum annuum L. Fruit Powder, Rutin (from Sophora japonica Flower Extract), Sage (Salvia officinalis) Leaf Powder, Holy Basil (Ocimum tenuiflorum) Leaf Powder (Organic), Black Sesame (Sesamum indicum) Seed Extract, Rosemary (Rosmarinus officinalis) Leaf Powder, Black Pepper (Piper nigrum) Fruit Extract (BioPerine®).

Other Ingredients: Vegetarian Capsule (Hypromellose), L-Leucine, Bamboo Leaf Extract.

Contains Sesame.

name: Liposomal Advanced Creatine
description_html:
Benefits

  • Supports muscle recovery during and after exercise*
  • Sustains performance during high-intensity exercise*
  • Promotes energy metabolism during exercise*
  • Helps maintain healthy cognitive function, including focus and concentration*

Third Party Testing

Tested for purity and safety by Certified Labs. Verified absence of harmful bacteria, heavy metals, and contaminants. Product meets all quality standards, with clear labeling and stability checks for your peace of mind.

View Full PDF

Description

Cymbiotika’s Liposomal Advanced Creatine is designed for optimal muscle recovery support, sustained high-intensity performance support, energy metabolism support, and cognitive support in an easy-to-digest formula with superior absorption.* Trailblazing creatine supplementation with its liposomal emulsion, each on-the-go packet includes 5g of clinically studied CreaBev® creatine monohydrate, providing 21% more creatine and 15% better absorption compared to standard creatine.

Creatine is typically unstable in liquid, which is why most products come as dry mixes. Our advanced liposomal emulsion eliminates preparation time and concerns about harmful creatine metabolites. Each serving delivers shelf-stable, liposomally-delivered creatine ready to support performance, recovery, and cognitive function whenever you need it. With its delicious tangerine vanilla flavor, Advanced Creatine is the best-tasting, ready-to-use creatine on the market.

How to Enjoy

How: Squeeze contents of packet directly into mouth or stir into a beverage.

When: For best results, cycle 6 days on and 1 day off.

Dose: 1 packet

Notes: We recommend taking this supplement before exercise.

Ingredients

Active Ingredients: Creatine Monohydrate (as CreaBev®) and Phosphatidylcholine (from Sunflower Lecithin)

Other Ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Organic Cassava Syrup, Pectin, Organic Vanilla Powder,  Organic Vanilla Extract, Malic Acid, Tangerine Oil, Sodium Alginate, Rowanberry Extract,  Rebaudioside M, D-Alpha-Tocopherol, Beta Carotene (color), Calcium Lactate.

Magnesium is an essential mineral involved in over 300 enzymatic processes, supporting nerve function, muscle health, energy production, and a healthy heart rhythm.*

Cymbiotika’s 3-in-1 Liposomal Magnesium Complex delivers an intentional blend of three highly absorbable, stomach-friendly forms of magnesium: magnesium taurate, magnesium bisglycinate, and GIVOMAG™ Magnesium Glycerophosphate for comprehensive, whole-body support.

This formula supports magnesium absorption and gentle digestion, while helping maintain heart, brain, muscle, and nervous system health.*

name: Liposomal NAD+
description_html:
Benefits

Liposomal NAD+ may help with the following:

  • Supports cellular energy production*
  • Promotes healthy aging*
  • Encourages even skin tone and radiance*

Third Party Testing

Tested for purity and safety by Certified Labs. Verified absence of harmful bacteria, heavy metals, and contaminants. Product meets all quality standards, with clear labeling and stability checks for your peace of mind.

View Full PDF

Description

Cymbiotika’s Liposomal NAD+ is formulated to support healthy cellular function and energy metabolism.* It was designed to promote longevity via healthy aging, healthy cardiovascular function, and cognitive function as part of a balanced lifestyle.*

NAD+ is a coenzyme found in all living cells and is involved in energy metabolism and healthy cellular function.* It plays a critical role in converting nutrients into ATP, supporting healthy cognitive function and maintaining cardiovascular health and metabolic health as we age. NAD+ levels may help maintain cellular health and vitality over time.*

This formula takes a restorative approach to replenishing and sustaining NAD+ with a combination of complementary ingredients that facilitate the process. Apigenin reduces NAD+ waste in the body, TMG aids in the process of recycling NAD+, and niacin is repurposed into NAD+. The formula also features Lutemax®, a clinically studied blend of lutein and zeaxanthin that helps support skin appearance, helping promote a more even-toned and luminous look.*

Liposomal NAD+ was crafted to promote the systems that determine both how we feel today and how we age over time, making longevity support a daily practice.

How to Enjoy

How: Squeeze contents of packet into mouth or stir into your favorite beverage.

When: Daily

Dose: 1 packet

Notes: Morning is ideal, but it can be taken any time of day.

Ingredients

Active Ingredients: Niacin, Trimethylglycine, Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide, Phosphatidylcholine (from Sunflower Lecithin), Apigenin, Caffeine (from Green Coffee Bean Extract), Lutein (from Lutemax® 2020 Marigold Flower Extract), and Zeaxanthin (from 2 mg Lutemax® 2020 Marigold Flower Extract).

Other Ingredients: Organic Cassava Syrup, Glycerin, Water, Avocado Oil, Organic Cocoa Extract, Sea Salt, Organic Vanilla Extract, Organic Vanilla Powder, Organic Orange Extract, Beta Pectin, D-Alpha-Tocopherol, Sodium Alginate, and Calcium Lactate.

Vitamin D3 plays a key role in bone health by supporting calcium and phosphorus absorption, helping maintain healthy teeth and a strong skeletal system. Our plant-based D3, derived from lichen, offers a natural source similar to that produced by the body through sunlight exposure.*

Vitamin K2 works to help direct calcium to the bones and away from soft tissues. This supports healthy bone density and heart health. Unlike many formulas that provide only one form, ours includes both MK-4 and MK-7 for broad spectrum support.*

How to Enjoy

Take one serving daily or as directed by your healthcare professional.

Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

Consult your healthcare professional before taking any dietary supplements, including if you are pregnant, nursing, or have a medical condition.*

Ingredients

Vitamin D (as Cholecalciferol from Lichen), Vitamin K2 MK-4, Vitamin K2 MK-7, Phosphatidylcholine (from sunflower lecithin), CoQ10 (ubiquinol)

Other Ingredients: Glycerin, Water, Organic Cassava Syrup, Pectin, Organic Vanilla Extract, Malic Acid, Organic Tangerine Oil, D-Alpha-Tocopherol, Sodium Alginate, Rowanberry Fruit Extract, Organic Vanilla Powder, Calcium Lactate, Beta Carotene (color).

Description

The hydrogen molecule is the smallest molecule that exists, and serves as a powerful antioxidant within the body. Due to its minuscule size, it crosses cellular barriers and absorbs easily throughout the body. The human body requires the right balance of free radicals to promote antioxidant activity. Hydrogen immediately provides balance in the body by neutralizing free radicals and oxidative stress. By achieving this at the cellular level, the body maintains homeostasis and slows premature aging. This is done by adding hydrogen gas to water, increasing its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Our H2 tablets are the best solution for creating hydrogen rich water.

Produces 12ppm of Molecular Hydrogen per serving

How to Enjoy

H2 molecular hydrogen tablets are fast-dissolving dietary supplements. Dissolve one hydrogen tablet in 12-16 oz of room temperature water. Drink immediately. Best taken 30 minutes apart from food and on an empty stomach. Do not swallow the hydrogen tablet directly.*

May repeat up to twice a day.

Store: Keep in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight.

*To be used as directed by your healthcare provider or physician.

View Full PDF

Description

NMN (Nicotinamide Mononucleotide) is a molecule derived from niacin, a form of Vitamin B3. Niacin is also referred to as nicotinic acid and is one of the 13 essential vitamins required by the human body for optimal health. NMN has gained recent attention for its potential for slowing down the aging process and its ability to improve mitochondrial function.

Cymbiotika’s NMN with added polyphenols and antioxidants can significantly boost NAD (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) levels throughout the body. NAD plays an important role in energy, metabolism and maintenance of healthy gene expression. By boosting NMN levels in the body through NMN supplementation, we enhance the biosynthesis of NAD and help restore declining levels of NAD as we age. Since NAD production is critical for keeping your cells working at optimal levels, Nicotinamide Mononucleotide is seen as an important dietary supplement for maintaining cellular health. 

How to Enjoy

Take 2 capsules daily*

Store in a cool dark place.

*To be used as directed by your healthcare provider or physician.
Disclaimer: If you are pregnant, nursing a baby, or have a chronic medical condition such as diabetes, hypertension or heart disease, be sure to consult your doctor or pharmacist before purchasing or taking any supplement.

Other Ingredients:  Veggie Capsule (Hypromellose)

Description

Cymbiotika’s Super Greens is a convenient way to boost your daily nutrition. It contains a bioavailable complex of natural plant compounds including chlorophyll, glucoraphanin, broccoli seed and other alkalizing greens. This product promotes a healthy immune response while supporting cellular detoxification and energy production.

How to Enjoy

Take 1 pouch daily*

Squeeze contents of pouch into mouth or stir into your favorite beverage.

Store in a cool, dark place or refrigerate after opening. Do not freeze.

30 pouches per container.

View Full PDF

Description

Cymbiotika’s Topical Magnesium Oil spray is scientifically formulated to absorb into the bloodstream within minutes, keeping your skin free of oil residue. Magnesium is an essential trace mineral responsible for more than 300 enzymatic systems that regulate diverse biochemical reactions in the body, including muscle and nerve function, blood glucose control, blood pressure regulation, and healthy brain development. Prolonged magnesium deficiency can impact your long-term health and since our bodies cannot produce enough magnesium on its own, magnesium supplementation is the most effective way to elevate magnesium levels. Some signs of low magnesium levels include chronic health conditions such as muscle cramps or spasms.

Topical, or transdermal magnesium is a quick and easy way to increase magnesium levels beyond taking an oral supplement. You can quickly address sore muscles and tired joints by applying this magnesium spray onto the problematic areas. Our topical magnesium oil spray also prepares your body for bed. Applying before bed can relax your body and mind for a good night’s rest.

How to Enjoy

15-20 sprays twice a day*

Spray and rub onto clean skin of the torso, chest, feet, legs, or arms.  Avoid sensitive areas.  Avoid contact with clothing, or other lotions until absorbed.

Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

*To be used as directed by your healthcare provider or physician.
Disclaimer: If you are pregnant, nursing a baby, or have a chronic medical condition such as diabetes, hypertension or heart disease, be sure to consult your doctor or pharmacist before purchasing or taking any supplement.

Ingredients

Distilled Water, Magnesium Chloride, Ashwagandha Extract, Dragons Blood Extract (Croton Lechleri Extract), Japanese Honeysuckle Extract, Copper Extract, Reishi Mushroom Extract, Shiitake Mushroom Extract, Lavender Extract, Aloe Vera Leaf Juice, Dimethyl Sulfoxide (DMSO), Organic Blue Agave Ferment, Niacinamide, Olive Extract, Arnica Extract

Description

Our cutting-edge liposomal delivery system is designed to enhance absorption and bioavailability, making each dose more effective than traditional vitamin C supplements. Clean, highly absorbable, and expertly formulated – helping you look and feel your best from the inside out.*

With Cymbiotika, you’re not just taking a supplement—you’re joining a community of people who value wellness, science, and the power of transparency. We’re here to empower you on your journey to better health, every step of the way.

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Consult your healthcare professional before taking any dietary supplements, including if you are pregnant, nursing, or have a medical condition.
